name: Diner Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine all ingredients except tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese in a large bowl. Mix lightly.
3. In a 10 x 6-inch loaf pan, shape the meat mixture into a loaf.
4. Bake for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
5. Drain excess fat from the meat loaf.
6. Pour the remaining tomato sauce over the meat loaf during the last half hour of baking time.
7. Place slices of mozzarella cheese on top of the meat loaf.
8. Continue baking for an additional 5 to 10 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
9. Serves 4 to 6 people.
